tasks.title: Fix all failing tests
tasks.description: Run the full test suite using 'npx vitest run' to identify any failing tests. Read the failing test files and the source code they test. Fix issues by either: 1) Updating test assertions to match the current correct implementation, or 2) Fixing bugs in the source code if tests reveal actual issues. Key test files to check: src/components/ThemeToggle.test.jsx, src/components/Navbar.test.jsx, src/components/Footer.test.jsx, src/sections/Contact.test.jsx, src/sections/Home.test.jsx, src/sections/Projects.test.jsx, src/sections/About.test.jsx, src/App.test.jsx. Pay special attention to tests related to theme switching and navigation based on recent changes.
acceptance_criteria: All test files execute without runtime errors
No skipped or disabled tests remain

tasks.title: Validate all tests pass
tasks.description: Run the complete test suite using 'npx vitest run' to verify all tests pass successfully. Confirm zero test failures and that all test suites complete without errors.
acceptance_criteria: Command 'npx vitest run' exits with code 0
